EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when a customer hasn't provided CB due diligence and so is given cancellation notice.
EmailTemplate.name: Shortfall - Due Diligence 1 Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Your insurance policy is scheduled for cancellation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You elected to pay for your Kingsbridge business insurance policy {!Policy__c.Name} through direct debit payments.
Our credit providers Close Brothers Premium Finance require some additional information from you in order to continue providing the loan for your insurance policy.
You have not yet provided this information and so Close Brothers have cancelled your loan and your future payments remain outstanding. Because of this your insurance policy is scheduled to be cancelled on [ddmmyy].
If your insurance policy is cancelled, your business may not be covered against claims if you don't have another policy in place.
To stay protected, please provide us with the requested information and call us on 01242 808740 to make a payment or discuss further.
Please note, for data security reasons, do not send credit or debit card details to us via email.
If you have made a payment in the past 3 working days please disregard this email.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
